research_series.series_name: Team Process and Social Stress Variation Tree

core_interpretation: Team/social/workload signals are team-level and operational context layers, not individual psychiatric diagnosis.
guardrails: Do not infer individual psychopathology from team conflict alone.
Do not treat all conflict as harmful; distinguish task conflict from relational conflict.
Do not infer stress biology from workload score alone.
Separate communication frequency from communication quality.
research_gaps: No consensus on how team cohesion relates to performance in ICE/space analogs.
Few longitudinal studies tracking both behavioral/process markers and operational outcomes.
Limited integration of physiological markers with behavioral/social markers.
